name: Ga Doo Ri’s Sushi Restaurant
overview: “Ga Doo Ri’s Sushi Restaurant” is about the sweet yet fierce romance between dating expert Ga Doo Ri, who’s well known for her refreshing dating advice, and her mysterious next-door neighbor Cha Woo Bin.

trailers.title: 연애고수의 어장관리가 궁금해? [가두리횟집] 6월 9일 오픈예정 🌊 | 이주빈 한상혁 | Gaduri Restaurant | ENG SUB
